news.headline: Stocks to watch: FedEx, Nike. Carnival expected to earn 8 cents per share on $5.93 billion revenue. Nike reports $12.35 billion revenue.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures were down this morning, prompting investor focus on certain stocks today:- Carnival Corporation & Plc. (NYSE:CCL) is expected to announce earnings of 8 cents per share and revenue of $5.93 billion before the opening bell. After-hours trading saw Carnival's shares increase by 0.4% to $25.27.- NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) released second-quarter financial results that surpassed expectations post closing bell on Thursday. The company reported revenue of $12.35 billion for the second quarter, outperforming analyst predictions. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Turkey gets US exemption on Gazprombank sanctions - Minister.
Trump: Congress must get rid of, or extend the debt ceiling to perhaps, 2029.
CTP partners with Grammer Jifeng for a 21,000 sqm facility in Czech Republic for automotive seating production.
news.summary: In Amsterdam, CTP, the largest listed developer of industrial properties in Europe, has partnered with Grammer Jifeng Automotive Seating CZ to construct a state-of-the-art manufacturing and testing warehouse spanning 21,000 sqm at CTPark Cheb in the northwest of the Czech Republic. Grammer Jifeng Automotive Seating CZ is known for producing automotive interior components. This collaboration highlights the increasing demand for industrial spaces in the region.

news.headline: 5-month high for Iranian oil stored at sea due to sanctions impact.
Trump: I told the EU they must make up the US deficit by buying oil and gas.
UK's Chancellor Reeves to meet with China's He Lifeng on January 11.

Hyundai Motor Group Executive Chair Euisun Chung chosen as President of Korea Archery Association for sixth term, enhancing Korean archery's international success with innovative training initiatives.
news.summary: The Executive Chair of Hyundai Motor Group has been re-elected to lead the Korean Archery Association (KAA) for another four years, marking his sixth consecutive term. During Chung's leadership, Korean archery has achieved unprecedented success at global competitions. He is dedicated to enhancing the sport through creative training programs and other initiatives.

news.headline: Toyoda Gosei invests in Pi Photonics, startup for LED lighting, aiming high visibility in industrial use.
news.summary: In KIYOSU, Japan, Toyoda Gosei recently made an investment in Pi Photonics, a company specializing in LED lighting for industrial applications. The investment was aimed at supporting the development of LED technology capable of projecting highly visible light patterns.

news.headline: Cathie Wood predicts M&A surge post-2024 election, sees Bitcoin hitting $1.5 million by 2030 as it becomes 'more scarce than gold'.
news.summary: Renowned investor Cathie Wood of Ark Investment Management LLC anticipates a rise in M&A activity post the 2024 election, envisioning more opportunities as regulatory barriers may ease under a new administration. Wood, who oversees the ARK Innovation ETF (NYSE:ARKK), conveyed in a recent interview that the Federal Trade Commission has hindered M&A deals, suggesting a shift in policy direction. In addition to her insights on mergers, Wood remains bullish on cryptocurrencies, particularly Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), forecasting a potential price surge to $1.5 million by 2030. She noted Bitcoin's increasing scarcity compared to gold, citing the halving in April and resulting reduced annual supply growth to 0.9%, a contrast to gold's production dynamics tied to price increases. Wood's perspectives shed light on evolving investment landscapes and potential trends in the wake of future political developments.

news.headline: Toyoda Gosei invests in EV Motors Japan, developing commercial electric vehicles in Japan.
news.summary: In KIYOSU, Japan, Toyoda Gosei has recently invested in EV Motors Japan, a new company focused on designing and marketing electric vehicles for commercial use.

news.headline: First NMN supplement manufacturer MIRAILAB BIOSCIENCE launches in Singapore. Brand "MIRAI LAB" with β-NMN available on Shopee.
news.summary: In Tokyo, MIRAILAB BIOSCIENCE Inc., led by CEO Megumi Tanaka, has appointed Global Ocean Distribution Pte Ltd in Circular Road, directed by Getty Poon, to handle sales of their supplement brand “MIRAI LAB” containing β-Nicotinamide Mononucleotide (β-NMN). These supplements, now accessible on Shopee in Singapore, are garnering attention due to NMN’s researched benefits.

news.headline: Nokia and Turkcell show top-notch quantum-safe protection for mobile customers, setting a new standard in the industry.
US representatives to meet with Syrian rebels who overthrew Assad; significant development in the conflict.
Harju Elekter AB signs 3-year agreement with E.ON Energidistribution AB to deliver 2000 substations in Sweden for 15M euros.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Harju Elekter AB, a subsidiary of Harju Elekter Group based in Sweden, finalized a fresh 3-year framework contract with E.ON Energidistribution AB, the biggest distribution network firm in Sweden. The agreement, lasting until December 31, 2027, entails the delivery of around 2000 substations. The overall worth of this deal stands at close to 15 million euros.

news.headline: American billionaire invests in English football, transforming it with his wealth and expertise, according to Bloomberg.
Olive oil crisis resolved, worries persist after recent events.
Santhera Pharmaceuticals receives approval in Hong Kong for AGAMREE® (vamorolone) to treat Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy in patients 4+.
news.summary: Swiss pharmaceutical company, Santhera Pharmaceuticals, reported on December 20, 2024, that the Department of Health in Hong Kong, China, has granted approval for the use of AGAMREE® (vamorolone) in patients who are 4 years old and above. Santhera Pharmaceuticals is listed on the SIX exchange under the ticker symbol SANN.

news.headline: EU official considers seizing Russian assets amid tensions - Source.
Kitron Sweden is expanding factory in Jönköping with 6000 sqm, set to be finished by second half of 2025.
news.summary: In the latter half of 2025, an increase of around 6000 square meters is planned for the factory due to expansion.

news.headline: An heir of 7-Eleven is fighting a $50B battle to maintain family ownership amidst clashes with shareholder focus.
news.summary: The struggle for dominance over the company highlights the clash between traditional family-owned business models and a more shareholder-focused approach.

news.headline: Idorsia offers update on ongoing talks for global rights to aprocitentan. #ExclusiveNegotiations #GlobalRights
Top brokers in India prepare for an impending slump due to changes in options market, per reports.
Matrixport is pursuing a license for virtual asset services in Gelephu Mindfulness City, Bhutan, expanding presence in South Asia.
news.summary: Matrixport is seeking approval for a Financial Services Permission Licence to provide virtual asset services in Gelephu Mindfulness City in Bhutan, further solidifying its foothold in South Asia. This move will enable Matrixport to expand its operations in the region, tapping into the growing market for digital assets. The license will grant Matrixport the authority to offer a range of financial services related to virtual assets, catering to the increasing demand for such services in Bhutan. This strategic decision aligns with Matrixport’s objective to strengthen its position in the South Asian market and cater to the diverse needs of customers in the region. By securing this license, Matrixport aims to enhance its reputation as a trusted provider of virtual asset services, positioning itself as a key player in the evolving financial landscape of Bhutan.

news.headline: Chinese company Hithium plans $500 million HK IPO in 2023.
Education Cannot Wait allocates $20 million grant in Chad, totaling $61 million funding. 3.2 million children out of school.
news.summary: The increased funding, overseen by UNICEF in collaboration with domestic and global allies, will address escalating requirements that have resulted in 3.2 million children being unable to attend school. Recently announced in New York on December 20, 2024, the grant will particularly benefit Chad, recognized as one of the most impoverished nations globally. Overall, the assistance will impact a significant number of individuals beyond Chad, aiming to mitigate the harsh realities faced by numerous communities.

news.headline: El Salvador acquires 11 BTC post $1.4 million IMF loan, aiming to limit government involvement in crypto activities.
news.summary: El country of El Salvador recently acquired 11 units of Bitcoin. This acquisition took place immediately following the approval of a $1.4 million loan deal with the International Monetary Fund (IMF). As part of the conditions of this loan agreement, there is an obligation for El Salvador to decrease its involvement in "Bitcoin-related economic activities" within the public sector.

news.headline: Peel Hunt: Expects Fed to Cut Rates by 50 bps in 2025, Half of Previous Forecast
China's one-year bond yield continues to fall, dropping 12 basis points to 0.9%.
POWERCHINA ranked first among global engineering design companies by ENR for 5 years, aiding in infrastructure development. Li Dezhi and Nara Laborinho highlighted.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Beijing, POWERCHINA, a leading engineering design company globally ranked first among the top 150 companies by ENR for five years, is aiding infrastructure development in regions requiring construction. Noteworthy individuals like Li Dezhi and Nara Laborinho are also involved in this effort.

Tune in to Insight with Haslinda Amin on 12/20/2024 for market analysis and news. #bloomberg #12/20/2024
President-elect Trump transfers 115M shares of Trump Media to trust overseen by son Donald Trump Jr.
news.summary: According to a report submitted to regulatory authorities, the incoming president gave away approximately 115 million shares of Trump Media to a trust overseen by his son, Donald Trump Jr.

news.headline: Talk of 'buying the dip' spikes as Bitcoin dips below $100k before Christmas, hitting 8-month high in social media mentions: Santiment.
news.summary: In the days leading up to Christmas, the frequency of mentions on social media about "buying the dip" surged as Bitcoin fell below the six-figure price level. This data comes from Santiment, indicating a noticeable increase in interest and discussion surrounding the topic amidst the cryptocurrency's recent price drop.

news.headline: El Salvador buys 11 Bitcoins (worth >$1M) post IMF advice to cut down; increasing daily purchase from 1 to 11 BTC.
news.summary: El country of El Salvador took advantage of the market decline on Thursday by purchasing as many as 11 Bitcoins (CRYPTO: BTC), totaling over one million dollars, for its reserve. The National Bitcoin Office, an agency appointed by President Nayib Bukele to manage all matters related to the primary cryptocurrency, reported that the Central American nation increased its daily purchase limit to 11 Bitcoins, a significant increase from the previous one Bitcoin per day policy. In a recent tweet, the Bitcoin Office confirmed the transfer of over a million dollars worth of Bitcoin to the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. This recent acquisition adds to the country's growing Bitcoin reserve.

news.headline: Netherlands Consumer Confidence drops to -26 in December
German authority orders Worldcoin to implement GDPR-compliant data deletion protocol by end of January.
news.summary: The data regulator in Bavaria has issued a directive to Worldcoin, requiring them to implement a data deletion protocol that complies with GDPR standards before the end of January.

news.headline: Xiaocaiyuan, backed by Harvest Capital, goes public on Hong Kong Stock Exchange (stock code: 00999.HK), with 663 total...
news.summary: Hong Kong saw Xiaocaiyuan, a Harvest Capital portfolio company, debut on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange on December 20, 2024, under the stock code of 00999.HK. By the conclusion of the first three quarters of the same year, Xiaocaiyuan boasts a total of 663...

news.headline: First hybrid Bitcoin-Ethereum ETFs approved by SEC from Hashdex, Franklin Templeton after several review extensions.
news.summary: After several extensions of the review process starting in June, regulatory authorities have officially given the green light to the initial two dual Bitcoin-Ethereum Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs).

news.headline: Sanofi has acquired rights to develop and commercialize aficamten in Greater China, for treating patients with hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM).
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Cytokinetics, Incorporated shared that Sanofi will be gaining exclusive rights to advance and market aficamten from Corxel Pharmaceuticals for patients with obstructive and non-obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM) in Greater China. Aficamten, a cutting-edge cardiac myosin inhibitor, shows promise in managing HCM cases. This collaboration comes as a strategic move in the medical field, considering the rising cases of HCM worldwide. Under this agreement, Sanofi will be taking the lead in developing and introducing aficamten specifically in the Greater China region, indicating a pivotal step towards addressing HCM-related challenges in the area.

news.headline: Insurtech bolttech secures Series C funding led by Dragon Fund for expansion, Baillie Gifford, Generali also investing.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Singapore, bolttech, a rapidly expanding insurtech company, revealed that Dragon Fund by Liquidity and MUFG will be the primary investor in bolttech's Series C funding round. They will be joined by investors Baillie Gifford and Generali - through Lion River, a company within the Group.

news.headline: Hepsor AS reveals their financial calendar for 2025, highlighting key dates for investors and stakeholders.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.5%, marking a significant increase from the previous month. This spike in unemployment has left over 2 million individuals without jobs, with the current number of unemployed individuals standing at 2.3 million. Experts attribute this sudden rise to the ongoing economic challenges and the impact of the global pandemic. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job opportunities in various sectors, with the service and hospitality industries being hit the hardest. Government officials have expressed concerns over the situation and are working on implementing measures to address the growing unemployment rate.

news.headline: Vance to meet with House Freedom Caucus on short-term funding: Punchbowl
Employees in 3 cities, including Los Angeles, Chicago, and Seattle, set to strike on Friday due to failed negotiations on raises.
news.summary: Employees in Los Angeles, Chicago, and Seattle are set to go on strike following unsuccessful negotiations between the company and the workers’ union regarding salary increases.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures fell after House rejected Trump-backed bill, nears government shutdown. Market bounce fizzled.
news.summary: Stock market futures experienced a decline after the House dismissed a bill supported by Trump aiming to prevent a government shutdown. This occurred on Thursday following a brief rise in the market. The Dow Jones futures fell as a result, indicating potential economic challenges ahead.

news.headline: Keg Royalties Income Fund declares $0.0946 per unit cash distribution for January 2025, payable on Jan 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 19, 2024, The Keg Royalties Income Fund (TSX: KEG.UN) revealed that a distribution of $0.0946 per unit has been sanctioned for January 2025. This distribution will be granted to unitholders recorded as of December 31, 2024, and will be disbursed on January 31, 2025. The decision to set an earlier record date for this distribution compared to other months aligns with the Fund's year-end schedule.

news.headline: Report finds minimal progress in addressing China's housing crisis; situation remains dire despite efforts.
Walrus Pump (TPEX: 6982) enters Taiwan OTC market at NTD 51, attracting global demand for water pumps.
news.summary: Walrus Pump, a prominent pump brand trading under the ticker symbol TPEX: 6982, made its official debut on the Taiwan OTC market on the 18th. The underwriting price for its initial listing was set at NTD 51.
